notes: Confirms prior audit. Instruction (autoPaths/customPaths bug in series URLs) aligns with patch (Object.hasOwn() conversions, customPathValues collision check, resolveSeriesSlug helper extraction, mock-isolation fix in test file, dev-mode encoded-Unicode postSlug variants). 7/8 F2P tests are new (added in patch), behavioral (assert params contain expected slug structures via toContainEqual), and do not leak gold-patch function names like resolveSeriesSlug or Object.hasOwn — agents are free to use any equivalent implementation. The 8th F2P ('[slug]/page/[page]/page returns placeholder when no custom paths') appears as pre-existing context but plausibly fails in the buggy state due to mock-isolation leakage between describe blocks (the patch adds the missing afterAll mock.module('@/lib/urls', () => snapshotUrls) restore), so its F2P classification is defensible. PASS_TO_PASS empty so the test.sh's pass_to_pass branch is dead code — no zero-bug. The Unicode-encoded postSlug tests are tangentially related to the headline instruction but represent real patch behavior and assert observable output, not implementation. No REDACTED leaks, no path mismatches in install_config.json, source/test files match patch.
